location.name: San Joaquin Delta
location.level_note: Base level 34 required, but UNLOCKED via DLC at level 33

advanced.name: Advanced California License
advanced.recommendation: REQUIRED for White Sturgeon (best at night) and Striped Bass boat fishing

spots.name: The Foggy Sanctuary
spots.description: Mouth of San Joaquin River at Saint-Anne Bay. Old wooden docks on a channel. Often dense fog.
spots.wiki_note: Recommended starting point for new visitors

spots.name: Below the Cryton Dam
spots.description: Whitewater tributary with riffles, shallows, weeds, and rocky constructions. Wading required.

spots.name: Fishing the Beaver
spots.description: Beaver Island in the San Joaquin River, overlooking Cryton Dam and stilt-house settlement.

spots.name: Southern Docks
spots.description: Southwestern SJD with wooden docks facing Beaver Island.

trophy_targets.name: Striped Bass
trophy_targets.notes: MARQUEE TROPHY SPECIES. Active around docks and weedy waters. Both bait and lure approaches work.

trophy_targets.name: Steelhead Trout
trophy_targets.notes: Best targeted Below the Cryton Dam in whitewater. Wader spot. Topwater Steelhead competition active.

trophy_targets.name: Common Carp
trophy_targets.notes: Best at Fishing the Beaver and Southern Docks. Use feeder rod with sweet corn. C'mon Carp! competition runs here.

trophy_targets.name: Chinook Salmon
trophy_targets.notes: Best Below the Cryton Dam during spawning runs. Fishing Planet Anniversary Cup destination.

trophy_targets.name: Redear Sunfish
trophy_targets.notes: Panfish trophy species. Float rod with light bait at all dock spots.

monster.name: Gourmet Bass
monster.best_lure: Brown Gourmet Spoon 28g #5/0 (Monster Lure - mission reward)
monster.notes: Monster fish - obtained through Fish Monsters mission chain. No natural bait option.

common_only.name: Largemouth Bass
common_only.notes: COMMON ONLY at SJD - no trophy/unique. Small fish, finesse approach.

common_only.name: Smallmouth Bass
common_only.notes: COMMON ONLY at SJD. Finesse spinning gear.

common_only.name: White Catfish
common_only.notes: TINY catfish - max 1.9 lb. Don't waste rod slots on it.

common_only.name: California Roach
common_only.notes: Tiny endemic species. First-catch XP only.

sturgeon_UPDATED.name: White Sturgeon
sturgeon_UPDATED.best_spot: Fishing the Beaver (CONFIRMED hotspot 4/10 - 5 sturgeon 39-54 lb in single session)
sturgeon_UPDATED.session_record: User caught 54.302 lb on 4/10 (Large Cutbait, midday) - supersedes stale 44.1 lb cap
sturgeon_UPDATED.notes: PRIMARY INCOME TARGET at SJD. Trophy class exists. Best at NIGHT with Advanced License - 'Sturgeon in the Dark' competition active. Use 3 X-Heavy bottom rods with Large Cutbait + #4/0 at Fishing the Beaver for volume fishing. Mokonzi solo gets heavily taxed - diversify across Heavy Chaser + Humenus + Tribal Totem + Mokonzi.

loadout_assessment.current_state: REVISED 2026-04-10: Current X-Heavy loadout is actually well-suited for SJD. Field test confirmed: Steelhead on Medium FarCaster halved reel durability (100% -> 50%) - LIGHT/MEDIUM RODS ARE NOT VIABLE at SJD. Fish are big and aggressive enough to damage finesse gear.
loadout_assessment.key_finding: SJD trophy fish (Striped Bass 53 lb, Common Carp 54 lb, Steelhead 38.6 lb, Chinook 43 lb, Sturgeon 44 lb) all require X-Heavy gear despite the location's reputation for finesse bass fishing. The Largemouth/Smallmouth Bass (max 3.3 lb common only) are not worth dedicated finesse tackle - skip them or catch incidentally.
problems_with_original_loadout: Duck Mussel Meat doesn't work at SJD - sturgeon takes Large Cutbait #4/0
Hook sizes too large in some places (#8/0 too big for SJD - #4/0 to #6/0 better)
Missing key baits: Large Cutbait (sturgeon/striped bass), Corn (carp), Shiners (bass/salmon/steelhead)
what_NOT_to_do: Do NOT swap to medium/light rods - durability damage on big fish hits will be significant
Do NOT bring a finesse panfish rod - any light line will get broken by carp omnipresent at all dock spots
Do NOT skip Advanced License - night sturgeon fishing is the highest-value session

recommended_loadout.philosophy_v2_return_trip: REVISED 2026-04-12 for return trip: FOCUS ON STURGEON FARMING + SALMON MISSION. Deploy 4-Rod Stand at Fishing the Beaver with 4x X-Heavy bottom rods all rigged identically for Large Cutbait sturgeon volume. One active spinning rod for Striped Bass bycatch + Triple Runner. One dedicated casting rod with Green and Black Single Spoon 42g #4/0 for Salmon Hunt mission (wade at Cryton Dam). Skip the finesse/panfish diversification from 4/10 — Ichthyologist challenge already complete.
recommended_loadout.philosophy: REVISED 2026-04-10: Use existing X-Heavy loadout. SJD fish are big enough to damage Medium/Light gear (steelhead halved FarCaster reel durability in one fight). Keep heavy rods, just change baits and hooks to match SJD species. NO PIKE/MUSKIE at SJD - fluoro leaders preferred except on sturgeon rods (titanium for scute abrasion).

slots.rod: Heavy Chaser 9'10" SE (X-Heavy Bottom, line 22-56.2 Lb)
slots.leader: Titanium .012" (~24 Lb) - already equipped, good for sturgeon scutes
slots.bait: Large Cutbait (CHANGED from Duck Mussel Meat)
slots.targets: White Sturgeon (44 lb), Striped Bass (52 lb)

slots.rod: GalaxyCast 5'11" SE (Casting, X-Heavy, 7/8-2.5 Oz, line 8-33 Lb)
slots.leader: Fluorocarbon .018" (~25 Lb) - swap from .0085" titanium to thicker fluoro for striped bass abrasion + stealth
slots.lure: Brown Gourmet Spoon 28g #5/0 (if obtainable) or Medium Spoon 1 Oz #4/0
slots.targets: Striped Bass (52 lb), Largemouth Bass incidental

slots.rod: Salmonster 8'10" (Spinning, X-Heavy, line 18-46 Lb) - already equipped
slots.leader: Fluorocarbon .020" (~30 Lb) - swap from titanium to fluoro for stealth
slots.lure: Triple Runner 8ft #5/0 (works for Striped Bass per ubersheet)
slots.targets: Striped Bass (52 lb), Chinook Salmon, Steelhead

slots.rod: Tribal Totem 12'10" (X-Heavy Bottom, line 39.7-81.6 Lb) - already equipped
slots.line: Fluoro .033" (~79 Lb) - already equipped, max strength for big sturgeon
slots.leader: Titanium .018" (~50 Lb) - KEEP titanium for sturgeon scute abrasion
slots.bait: Large Cutbait (CHANGED from Medium Cutbait - per ubersheet)
slots.targets: Striped Bass (52 lb), White Sturgeon (44 lb)

slots.rod: Silverthorn Stake 7'6" (X-Heavy Casting, 7/8-3.16 Oz, line 35.3-88 Lb) - already equipped
slots.leader: Fluorocarbon .025" (~40 Lb) - swap from titanium .018 for stealth on line-wary salmon/steelhead
slots.lure: Green and Black Single Spoon 42g #4/0 (Chinook Salmon) or Rainbow Holographic Medium Spoon 28g #4/0 (Steelhead)
slots.targets: Chinook Salmon (43 lb), Steelhead Trout (38.6 lb)

slots.rod: Mokonzi 12'10" SE (X-Heavy Bottom, line 39.7-81.6 Lb) - already equipped
slots.leader: Titanium .014" (~28 Lb) - KEEP titanium for sturgeon scutes
slots.bait: Large Cutbait (CHANGED from Duck Mussel Meat)

slots.rod: Wicked Viking 8'6" (Match, line 28.6-83.8 Lb) - already equipped
slots.line: Fluoro .033" (~79 Lb) - already equipped, can handle 54 lb carp easily
slots.leader: Fluorocarbon .025" (~40 Lb) - swap from titanium .018 for stealth (carp are very line-shy)
slots.targets: Common Carp (54 lb max), bonus Redear Sunfish
slots.notes: Wicked Viking handles big carp easily. Use Corn on smaller hook (#4/0 or #6/0) for both Carp and incidental panfish (Bluegill, Redear).

leader_summary.fluorocarbon: Slots 2, 3, 5, 7 - SJD has no pike/muskie. Fluoro provides stealth for line-shy bass, salmon, steelhead, and carp.
leader_summary.titanium: Slots 1, 4, 6 - Sturgeon-targeting rods only. Titanium resists abrasion from sturgeon scutes (bony armor plates) during long fights.

what_was_dropped: Dedicated finesse panfish rod - carp omnipresence at all dock spots makes light line non-viable
Medium/Light bass spinning rods - SJD bass species are common-only and low value, not worth durability damage
Trout-specific finesse spinning - X-Heavy salmon rods (slots 3, 5) can handle steelhead with proper drag management

current_deployed_loadout_2026_04_13.description: ACTUAL loadout in use on Day 1 of 2026-04-13 return trip. 4-Rod Stand at Fishing the Beaver + 3 active rods (2 casting spoons for salmon mission, 1 GalaxyCast jig-and-shad for bass).

slots.rod: GalaxyCast 8'6"
slots.rod_specs: X-Heavy Casting, 3/4-2 1/8 Oz, 7-28.6 Lb, Mod Fast
slots.targets: Striped Bass, Largemouth Bass, trout bycatch
slots.notes: Soft plastic jig-and-shad for active bass/trout coverage. Replaces the Triple Runner Narrow Spoon combo — goes deeper to work bottom-structure bass.

slots.rod: Silverthorn Stake 7'6"
slots.targets: Trophy Chinook Salmon 33+ lb (SALMON HUNT MISSION)
slots.notes: Matches the Lemon Tiger Medium Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #4/0 Steam guide recommendation. Used Day 1 at Cryton Dam and boat south of Southern Docks. Trophies caught only ~20 lb so far — 33+ lb likely Unique class (RNG).

slots.rod: Rivertex Salmonster 8'10"
slots.rod_specs: X-Heavy Spinning, 3/4-2 1/8 Oz, 18-46 Lb, Mod Fast
slots.notes: Club-Series Glow&Holo spoon has produced mixed-species at St-Croix (brown trout, smallmouth bass). At SJD this is the lighter spoon option for chinook work.

slots.rod: Heavy Chaser 9'10" SE
slots.notes: UNEXPECTED FINDING 4/13: Crawfish on Heavy Chaser caught White Sturgeon 42.880 lb at midday. Crawfish works as a sturgeon alt-bait — not just a bass bait. Keep it as a diversifier on one rod to catch any sturgeon that ignore cutbait.

slots.rod: Humenus 11'1"
slots.notes: Proven 4/13 — multiple sturgeon caught on this rod Day 1.

slots.purpose: STURGEON FEEDER (4-Rod Stand position 3 - groundbait attractor)
slots.rod: Mokonzi 12'10" SE
slots.targets: White Sturgeon (groundbait attractor pulls fish to all 4 rods)
slots.notes: Groundbait-armed feeder concentrates sturgeon near the 4-rod spread. Working as designed.

slots.rod: Tribal Totem 12'10"

day_1_results.chinook_caught: 17.315 lb (Trophy) on Bullet Spinner 1 1/4 Oz #4/0 - NOT mission qualifying (needs 33+ lb)
day_1_results.crawfish_sturgeon_proof: 42.880 lb White Sturgeon on Crawfish (midday) - new bait validation

key_findings_to_add_to_analysis: Crawfish is a viable sturgeon bait at SJD (not just Large Cutbait)
Bullet Spinner 1 1/4 Oz #4/0 catches Chinook but under mission size
Single Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #4/0 on Silverthorn is the Day 1 primary salmon mission attempt lure
Club-Series Glow&Holo Medium Spoon 1 Oz #4/0 is Salmonster's SJD lure variant
GalaxyCast JigHead 3/4 Oz #3/0 + Shad 4" replaces the Triple Runner for bass work
33+ lb Chinook appears to require Unique class - multi-session attempt expected
deployment_sequence_day_2: Continue sturgeon farming at Fishing the Beaver - 4-Rod Stand already deployed
Expect fresh sturgeon activity Day 2 morning after in-game rest
Check fish finder for early-morning salmon spawn pass at Cryton Dam
Wade Cryton Dam dawn with slot 2 (Silverthorn + Single Spoon 1 1/2 Oz)
If no 33+ lb chinook by mid-morning Day 2, accept as multi-session goal and prioritize sturgeon sell-through
Sell fish before keeper over-cap (currently 639/925 lb)

lures_to_consider: Green and Black Single Spoon 42g #4/0 - chinook
Acid Green and Orange Buzzbait 24g #4/0 - largemouth bass
Yellow/Black X-Series Casting Spoon 21g #3/0 - smallmouth bass

first_trip: Buy Advanced License (550 BC unlimited or 8000 credits/day) - night fishing for sturgeon
Visit The Foggy Sanctuary first (wiki-recommended starting point)
Deploy bottom rods with Large Cutbait for Striped Bass
Active cast Triple Runner along docks for bass
Float rod with Bloodworms for panfish coverage (first-catch XP)
Move to Below the Cryton Dam for steelhead/salmon
Visit Fishing the Beaver and Southern Docks for carp

return_trip_strategy_2026_04_12.primary_goal: White Sturgeon income farming + Salmon Hunt (Spoon Lure) mission completion
session_plan: 1. Buy Advanced License (unlimited 550 BC) - night sturgeon + boat fishing unlocked
2. Travel to SJD. Head directly to Fishing the Beaver (confirmed sturgeon hotspot from 4/10)
3. Deploy 4-Rod Stand (Club-Series Rod Oasis) with Heavy Chaser + Humenus + Tribal Totem + Mokonzi — ALL WITH LARGE CUTBAIT + #4/0 HOOK
4. Active rod (Salmonster 8'10" + Kraken 8000 SE) with Triple Runner 8 ft #5/0 for Striped Bass bycatch
5. Fish through the day at Fishing the Beaver - expect 5-10 sturgeon per session (39-54 lb range based on 4/10 data)
6. Night: sturgeon activity peaks — stay through to catch Sturgeon in the Dark competition slot
7. Travel to Below the Cryton Dam for Salmon Hunt mission — wade out, cast Green and Black Single Spoon 42g #4/0 mid-channel
8. Trophy Chinook target: Buzzbait 1 Oz #4/0 also proven (38.55 lb on 4/10) - keep as backup
9. Trophy Steelhead (if bycatch): Spinnerbait 1 Oz #4/0 + Spinner Tail 2" confirmed (18.7 lb 4/10) or Lemon Tiger Medium Spoon 1 1/2 oz #4/0
10. Sell and return - skip the carp/panfish diversification from 4/10 trip (Ichthyologist challenge already complete)

expected_income.chinook_mission_reward: Salmon Hunt mission bonus (credits + BC + XP) on completion

key_lessons_from_4_10: Mokonzi SOLO got heavily taxed by 40-60 lb sturgeon - need 3-4 rods in rotation
Large Cutbait + #4/0 is the proven sturgeon combo (superior to Medium Cutbait)
Fishing the Beaver = sturgeon hotspot - no need to rotate spots
Skip the finesse/diversification trap - X-Heavy bottom focus is right
Buzzbait 1 Oz #4/0 = proven Trophy Chinook lure (38.55 lb catch) - viable alternative to Spoon
Sturgeon have TROPHY CLASS - stale JSON said common-only, proven wrong by 54.3 lb catch

income_priorities: White Sturgeon = BEST VOLUME INCOME ($45/lb, 40-55 lb common per fight = $1,800-$2,500 each, multiple per session)
Striped Bass = top trophy income ($1,904 max per fish, $36/lb)
Steelhead Trout = best $/lb at $54/lb (max $2,084 per trophy)
Common Carp = easy passive income ($45/lb, max $2,430 per trophy)
Redear Sunfish = surprisingly valuable at $54/lb (small but quick)

salmon_hunt_spoon_lure.requirement: Catch Chinook Salmon 33 lb+ using a Spoon lure
salmon_hunt_spoon_lure.critical_note: MUST be a Spoon - non-spoon catches (bait, crankbait, etc.) do NOT count toward mission
salmon_hunt_spoon_lure.recommended_setup: Silverthorn Stake 7'6" + Vampire's Bane 7500 + Mono .033" + Fluoro Leader .025" + Spoon 42g #4/0
salmon_hunt_spoon_lure.best_spot: Below the Cryton Dam - wade to mid-channel rocks, cast away from dam face
salmon_hunt_spoon_lure.retrieve: Medium-fast retrieve with occasional pauses (drop-and-pause cadence)

trophy_steelhead_mission.requirement: Catch Trophy Steelhead (38+ lb at SJD)
trophy_steelhead_mission.recommended_lure: Lemon Tiger Medium Spoon 1 1/2 oz #4/0 (per Steam guide) or Spinnerbait 1 Oz #4/0 + Spinner Tail 2"
trophy_steelhead_mission.best_spot: Below the Cryton Dam / mid-channel wading

competitions.name: Sturgeon in the Dark
competitions.notes: Perfect match for your return trip strategy - the sturgeon farming session will qualify you. Stay through to nightfall.

competitions.name: Steelhead Showdown
competitions.rules: TOPWATER GEAR ONLY, shore-only scoring, rod stands PROHIBITED, boats allowed for travel only
competitions.notes: Topwater constraint means no bottom rigs - must use spoons/crankbaits/surface lures

competitions.name: San Joaquin Extravaganza
competitions.notes: General eligibility - any trophy-class fish 11+ lb

weather_tips.sunny: Late summer/early fall - late morning and early evening when sun is high
weather_tips.cloudy: Fish active all morning from very early hours, productivity drops as sun rises
weather_tips.partly_cloudy: Late evening is best - twilight is prime for Crappie, Catfish, Walleye

slots.rod: GalaxyCast 8'6" (Casting Rod, X-Heavy, 3/4-2 1/8 Oz, 7-28.6 Lb, Mod Fast)
slots.notes: Active jig-and-shad for structure bass. Deeper presentation than topwater lures. GalaxyCast 8'6" is longest X-Heavy casting rod in game (confirmed no upgrade exists). Braid + Titanium leader for max range and abrasion. 90% tension + Med-Fast reel speed needed if hooking 20+ lb bycatch.

slots.rod: Silverthorn Stake 7'6" (Casting Rod, X-Heavy, 7/8-3 1/6 Oz, 35.3-88 Lb) - Supernatural Pack
slots.setup_type: Casting Spoon - SALMON HUNT MISSION ROD
slots.notes: PRIMARY SALMON HUNT MISSION ROD. Single Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #4/0 matches Steam guide recommendation (Lemon Tiger Medium Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #4/0 class). MUST be a Spoon - other lures don't count for mission. Day 1: trophies caught only ~20 lb - 33+ lb likely requires Unique class spawn. Expect multi-session attempts.

slots.rod: Rivertex Salmonster 8'10" (Spinning, X-Heavy, 3/4-2 1/8 Oz, 18-46 Lb, Mod Fast)
slots.notes: Club-Series Glow&Holo spoon - lighter spoon option for Chinook mission attempts. Salmonster 8'10" + Kraken 8000 SE is the proven cross-location big-fish active combo (Saint-Croix catfish bycatch, SJD salmon). Titanium leader for sturgeon bycatch abrasion.

slots.rod: Heavy Chaser 9'10" SE (Bottom, X-Heavy, casting 6-8.5 Oz, 22-56.2 Lb, Fast)
slots.notes: NEW FINDING 4/13: Crawfish caught White Sturgeon 42.88 lb at midday - validates Crawfish as sturgeon bait at SJD. Alt-bait diversifier on the 4-Rod Stand alongside Large Cutbait rods. Keep Crawfish on this rod as the anti-cutbait-saturation variant.

slots.rod: Humenus 11'1" (Bottom, X-Heavy, 6 1/3-10 1/5 Oz, 14.3-72.7 Lb, Moderate) - Hellish Fighter Pack
slots.notes: Proven 4/13 - multiple sturgeon Day 1 on Large Cutbait + #4/0. Braid + Mono leader = long range + abrasion. Core sturgeon farming rod.

slots.rod: Mokonzi 12'10" SE (Feeder, X-Heavy, 6-9 7/8 Oz, 39.7-81.6 Lb, Moderate)
slots.terminal_tackle: Rusty Cage Feeder 5 2/3 Oz + Mix Grand Fish Feeder groundbait, Hook #4/0
slots.notes: GROUNDBAIT ATTRACTOR - the Mix Grand Fish Feeder concentrates sturgeon around the 4-Rod Stand spread. Deploy this rod first so groundbait saturates the zone before slots 4, 5, 7 start fishing. Working as designed on Day 1.

slots.rod: Tribal Totem 12'10" (Bottom, X-Heavy, 6-9 7/8 Oz, 39.7-81.6 Lb, Moderate) - Supernatural Pack
slots.notes: Supernatural Pack theme rig (Catfish Moustache Line + Horsehair Leader + Monkey Skull Sinker). Consistent sturgeon producer Day 1. 4th rod in the 4-Rod Stand fan pattern.
